_comment: Single source of truth for numeric protocol/safety constants that must agree across ESP32 firmware (C), Pi firmware (Python), and/or the dashboard (JS). Each group's "_targets" selects which generated files get it — most are firmware-internal (c+py); wire-framing values the dashboard also encodes carry js too. Edit this file, then run `make gen-constants` (also runs automatically on `make compile` / `make publish-pi-firmware`). Do NOT edit the generated files directly — `tools/gen-constants.py` will overwrite them.

chunked_transfer._comment: Shared begin/chunk/commit opcode framing used identically by OTA, camera-install, and the SIGNAL char's SDP-offer sub-protocol. OTA_OP_ABORT is OTA-specific (camera has its own OP_STOP=4, signal/ops-response have no abort concept) but genuinely 3-way shared, so it lives here too.

hub_broker._comment: MQTT-over-WebSockets listener port — fixed convention with the hub's pi/mosquitto.example.conf (better-robotics/hub CONTRACT.md). js-only: in this repo only the dashboard (hub transport + pair signaling/lobby) dials the broker; robot firmware never does.
